acceptance_criteria: The title, description, and opening frame the post as a claim about constraint mis-specification rather than a slogan about unlimited spending.
Sections 1-6 build causally from monetary position to sectoral accounting to control failure to fragility without repeated resets.
Section 7 limitations remain explicit and visible rather than buried.
The conclusion compresses the argument instead of re-stating earlier sections at full length.
constraints: Do not add new empirical or simulation claims in this pass.
Do not reintroduce excluded evidence from money_minsky_policy_mismatch_AUDIT.md.
description: Refine title, description, opening, section transitions, repetition, and conclusion shape. Emphasize the system-model thesis and keep the rhetoric subordinate to the argument.
goal: Tighten the post's argument architecture so the thesis, sections, and conclusion read as one coherent system-model argument rather than a set of adjacent claims.
implementation_notes: Superseded by task-016, which centers the Keynes quote as the post's diagnostic spine and makes the tone/voice requirements explicit.
title: Narrative coherence pass for money-minsky-policy-mismatch
